title: Marketing complete: all autonomous channels live, funnel unified on scan-first; HN+Reddit on founder
summary: As of 2026 06 13: full channel state in launch/CHECKLIST.md. Live: 2 X posts launch 2065492188671459595 + scan angle 6/13 , dev.to launch article scan first CTA after edit via JS textarea setter + input event — works on
body: As of 2026-06-13: full channel state in launch/CHECKLIST.md. Live: 2 X posts (launch 2065492188671459595 + scan-angle 6/13), dev.to launch article (scan-first CTA after edit via JS textarea setter + input event — works on dev.to's controlled editor), site/demo-form/waitlist/README funnel, npm+registry 2.2.2. Funnel unified: scan on YOUR repo -> install -> demo/waitlist; demo demoted everywhere. Cadence rules committed: 1 X post/day alternating angles, 1 dev.to article/week, never duplicate text. Pending founder: Show HN (launch/hn.md), Reddit manual paste (extension hard-blocks reddit.com). Content bank queued: receipts-week post, famous-repo Truth Reports, viewer live GIF.
